mechanism_summary: The model embeds each input as trigonometric features at a few key frequencies, multiplies them through attention and the MLP, and reads the answer out via cos(w_k (a + b - c)). The key frequencies below were found by taking the DFT of the embedding matrix along the token axis and keeping the frequencies with large norm. (Illustrative values; the true set is per-model and is produced by reference_solver.)
